Operation 'phoneValidate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Phone Validate' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what specific information is returned (carrier, number type, etc.) and doesn't explain the response structure. Enhanced summary is action-oriented and specific. data.current_description: Parse, validate and get location information about a phone number. Use this API to validate local and international phone numbers in any country.
data.summary_suggestion: Validate phone number and retrieve location data
data.description_suggestion: Parses, validates, and retrieves location information for local and international phone numbers. Accepts phone numbers in any country format. Returns validation status, location details, carrier information, and number type classification. Supports both standard and non-standard formatting.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Phone Validate' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what specific information is returned (carrier, number type, etc.) and doesn't explain the response structure. Enhanced summary is action-oriented and specific. Improved description clarifies inputs, outputs, and return value details for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'ipInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'IP Info' is too vague and generic. Description lacks detail about what specific location data is returned (country, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP). Enhanced summary is action-oriented and specific. Improved description clarifies the return value structure and use cases, enabling AI agents to better determine when this operation is appropriate.

data.current_description: Get location information about an IP address and do reverse DNS (PTR) lookups. Supports both IPv4 and IPv6.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve geolocation and DNS information for IP address
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves geolocation information and performs reverse DNS (PTR) lookups for a given IP address. Supports both IPv4 and IPv6 formats. Returns location data including country, city, coordinates, timezone, and ISP information along with reverse DNS results. Useful for IP-based geolocation and network reconnaissance.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'IP Info' is too vague and generic. Description lacks detail about what specific location data is returned (country, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP). Enhanced summary is action-oriented and specific. Improved description clarifies the return value structure and use cases, enabling AI agents to better determine when this operation is appropriate.

message: Operation 'urlInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'URL Info' is too generic. data.current_description: Parse, analyze and retrieve content from the supplied URL. Determine if a URL is well-formed and actually hosting real content.
data.summary_suggestion: Parse URL and analyze hosted content validity
data.description_suggestion: Parses, analyzes, and retrieves content information from a supplied URL. Validates URL formatting, verifies the URL is hosting real content, and extracts metadata. Returns URL structure details, HTTP status, content type, page title, and other relevant content information. Useful for URL validation, link verification, and content discovery.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'URL Info' is too generic. Description is vague about what 'content' is retrieved and what specific information is returned. Missing details about response structure and practical use cases. Enhanced summary is action-oriented and specific. Improved description clarifies inputs, outputs (metadata, HTTP status, content type, etc.), and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to apply this operation.
